DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Siu L. Ma, Esq. 566-5300 for defendant YUEN NGAR LUN demurring party

Ms. Ma appeared for clarification of the Court's tentative ruling. The Court having heard from counsel and reviewed the papers on file herein ruled as follows: demurrer overruled with 5 days leave to answer. The motion to strike is granted -- no opposition having been filed. (JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
